mapper.select: /* 데이터셋 요약 조회 dataset.selectDatasetSummary */ SELECT DS_SUM.TOTAL_DS_CNT AS TOTAL_DATASET_COUNT, DS_SUM.ACTIVE_DS_CNT AS ACTIVE_DATASET_COUNT, DS_SUM.INACTIVE_DS_CNT AS INACTIVE_DATASET_COUNT, DS_SUM.TOTAL_CHUNK_CNT AS TOTAL_VECTOR_COUNT, DS_SUM.AVG_SRCH_QUAL AS AVG_SEARCH_QUALITY, (SRC_SUM.TOTAL_DOC_CNT + SRC_SUM.TOTAL_URL_CNT) AS TOTAL_SOURCE_COUNT, SRC_SUM.TOTAL_DOC_CNT AS TOTAL_DOC_COUNT, SRC_SUM.TOTAL_URL_CNT AS TOTAL_URL_COUNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_DS_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN USE_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ACTIVE_DS_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN USE_YN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INACTIVE_DS_CNT, COALESCE(SUM(CHUNK_CNT), 0) AS TOTAL_CHUNK_CNT, ROUND(AVG(SRCH_QUAL), 1) AS AVG_SRCH_QUAL FROM TB_DS ) DS_SUM CROSS JOIN ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DOC WHERE USE_YN = 'Y') AS TOTAL_DOC_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CNT_URL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y') AS TOTAL_URL_CNT ) SRC_SUM

/* 데이터셋 단건 조회 dataset.selectDataset */ SELECT D.DATASET_ID, D.DS_NM, D.DESCRIPTION, D.VERSION, D.CHUNK_ALGO_CD, D.CHUNK_SIZE, D.CHUNK_OVERLAP, D.CHUNK_OPT_JSON, D.DATASET_BUILD_STATUS_CD, D.EMBED_MODEL_CD, D.VECTOR_DB_CD, D.CHUNK_CNT, D.SRCH_QUAL, D.USE_YN, DATE_FORMAT(D.MODIFY_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS MODIFY_DT, P.LOWERCASE_YN, P.WSP_NORM_YN, P.SPEC_CHR_RM_YN, P.SINGLE_CELL_TEXT FROM TB_DS D LEFT JOIN TB_DS_PREPROC P ON D.DATASET_ID = P.DATASET_ID WHERE D.DATASET_ID = #{datasetId}
/* 데이터셋 매핑 문서 목록 조회 dataset.selectDsDocList */ SELECT A.DATASET_ID , A.DOC_ID FROM TB_DS_DOC A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DATASET_ID = #{datasetId}
/* 데이터셋 매핑 URL 목록 조회 dataset.selectDsUrlList */ SELECT A.DATASET_ID , A.URL_ID FROM TB_DS_URL A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DATASET_ID = #{datasetId}
/* 카테고리 목록 조회 dataset.selectCategoryList */ SELECT CATEGORY_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, PARN_CAT_ID, CAT_LVL, SORT_ORD, CREATE_DT FROM TB_CONTENT_CAT ORDER BY SORT_ORD DESC

/* 데이터셋 문서 목록 조회 dataset.selectDatasetDocList */ SELECT A.DOC_ID , A.DOC_TITLE , A.CATEGORY_ID , A.AUTHOR , A.SEC_LVL , A.CONTENT , A.KEYWORDS , A.REF_URL , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DOC_FILE B WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.DOC_ID = A.DOC_ID AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y') AS FILE_COUNT FROM TB_DOC A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
/* 데이터셋 URL 목록 조회 dataset.selectDatasetUrlList */ SELECT A.CATEGORY_ID , A.URL_ID , A.URL_NAME , A.URL_ADDR FROM TB_CNT_URL A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
/* 데이터셋 매핑 문서 저장 dataset.saveDsDoc */ INSERT INTO TB_DS_DOC ( DATASET_ID, DOC_ID ) VALUES
( #{datasetId}, COALESCE(#{item.docId}, #{docId}) )

/* 데이터셋 매핑 URL 저장 dataset.saveDsUrl */ INSERT INTO TB_DS_URL ( DATASET_ID, URL_ID ) VALUES
( #{datasetId}, COALESCE(#{item.urlId}, #{urlId}) )
mapper.select: /* 데이터셋 매핑 이력 목록 조회 dataset.selectDsHistList */ SELECT A.HIST_ID , A.DATASET_ID , A.VER_NO , A.CHG_CONTENT , A.DEL_YN , A.CREATE_USER_ID , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_USER_ID , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_DS_HIST A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DATASET_ID = #{datasetId} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.HIST_ID DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
/* 데이터셋 매핑 이력 목록 조회 dataset.selectDsHistList */ SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM TB_DS_HIST A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DATASET_ID = #{datasetId} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.delete: /* 데이터셋 변경 이력 삭제 dataset.deleteDocDatasetHistory */ UPDATE TB_DS_HIST SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE HIST_ID = #{histId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DS_HIST ( HIST_ID, DATASET_ID, VER_NO, CHG_CONTENT, DEL_YN, CREATE_USER_ID, CREATE_DT, MODIFY_USER_ID, MODIFY_DT ) VALUES ( #{histId}, #{datasetId}, #{verNo}, #{chgContent}, #{delYn}, #{createUserId}, NOW(), #{modifyUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: /* 프롬프트 목록 조회 dataset.selectPromptList */ SELECT PROMPT_ID , PROMPT_NAME FROM TB_PROMPT WHERE 1 = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PROMPT_ID
